title: Proxy Startup and Initialization
interaction_flow: main → acquireLock(): write PID to evolver.pid (exclusive); if stale PID take over; returns bool
main: if acquireLock() returns false → process.exit(0)
main: registers process.on(exit/SIGINT/SIGTERM/uncaughtException) → releaseLock()
main: checks env EVOMAP_PROXY===1 || A2A_TRANSPORT===mailbox
main → startProxy({ hubUrl: process.env.A2A_HUB_URL })
startProxy → new EvoMapProxy(opts): sets hubUrl, dataDir, port, logger
startProxy → EvoMapProxy.start()
EvoMapProxy.start() → new MailboxStore(dataDir): opens/creates local SQLite-backed store
EvoMapProxy.start() → new LifecycleManager({ hubUrl, store, logger, getTaskMeta }): stores refs, sets _running=false
EvoMapProxy.start() → new TaskMonitor({ store, logger })
EvoMapProxy.start() → new SkillUpdater({ store, skillPath, logger })
EvoMapProxy.start() → new DmHandler({ store, logger })
EvoMapProxy.start() → new SessionHandler({ store, logger })
EvoMapProxy.start() → new SyncEngine({ store, hubUrl, getHeaders: ()=>lifecycle._buildHeaders(), onAuthError: ()=>lifecycle.reAuthenticate(), onInboundReceived: ()=>skillUpdater.pollAndApply() })
SyncEngine constructor → new OutboundSync({ store, hubUrl, getHeaders, logger })
SyncEngine constructor → new InboundSync({ store, hubUrl, getHeaders, logger })
EvoMapProxy.start() → buildRoutes(store, proxyHandlers, taskMonitor, { dmHandler, skillUpdater, sessionHandler, getHubMailboxStatus }): returns routes map
EvoMapProxy.start(): wraps OUTBOUND_ROUTES handlers to call sync.notifyNewOutbound() after each call
EvoMapProxy.start() → new ProxyHttpServer(routes, { port, logger }): sets basePort=19820 or EVOMAP_PROXY_PORT
EvoMapProxy.start() → ProxyHttpServer.start()
ProxyHttpServer.start() → clearIfStale(): removes stale settings file
ProxyHttpServer.start() → http.createServer((req,res) => _handleRequest(req,res))
ProxyHttpServer.start() → tryListen(server, port): attempts ports 19820..19919 until EADDRINUSE or success
ProxyHttpServer.start() → writeSettings({ proxy: { url, pid, started_at } }): writes proxy config to disk
ProxyHttpServer.start() → returns { port, url } to EvoMapProxy
EvoMapProxy.start() [if hubUrl set] → LifecycleManager.hello()
LifecycleManager.hello() → _buildHeaders(): Content-Type + optional Bearer node_secret + x-correlation-id
LifecycleManager.hello() → Hub: POST /a2a/hello { protocol:'gep-a2a', protocol_version:'1.0.0', message_type:'hello', sender_id, env_fingerprint, payload:{ capabilities } } timeout=15s
Hub → LifecycleManager.hello(): returns { payload: { node_secret?, status? } }
LifecycleManager.hello(): if node_secret in response → store.setState('node_secret', secret)
LifecycleManager.hello(): store.setState('node_id', nodeId) → returns { ok:true, nodeId, response }
EvoMapProxy.start() → LifecycleManager.startHeartbeatLoop(intervalMs=360000)
LifecycleManager.startHeartbeatLoop(): sets _running=true, calls tick() immediately
tick() → LifecycleManager.heartbeat()
LifecycleManager.heartbeat() → Hub: POST /a2a/heartbeat { node_id, evolver_version, env_fingerprint, meta:{ proxy_version, outbound_pending, inbound_pending, ...taskMeta } } timeout=10s
Hub → LifecycleManager.heartbeat(): response with optional events[], min_proxy_version
LifecycleManager.heartbeat(): if data.events → store.writeInboundBatch(events)
LifecycleManager.heartbeat(): if min_proxy_version > current → store.writeInbound({ type:'system', payload:{ action:'proxy_upgrade_required' } })
tick(): schedules next tick with setTimeout(interval or backoff if failures)
EvoMapProxy.start() → SyncEngine.start()
SyncEngine.start(): sets _running=true, _scheduleOutbound(500ms), _scheduleInbound(1000ms)
SyncEngine._scheduleOutbound(500ms): after 500ms → outbound.flush() → Hub: POST /a2a/mailbox/send (pending outbound messages)
SyncEngine._scheduleInbound(1000ms): after 1000ms → inbound.pull() → Hub: poll for new inbound messages; then inbound.ackDelivered()
EvoMapProxy.start() → returns { url, port, nodeId: lifecycle.nodeId }
startProxy → returns { proxy, url, port, nodeId }
main: logs '[Proxy] Started on ' + proxyInfo.url
main → registerMailboxTransport(): registers mailbox as A2A transport
main: sets process.env.A2A_TRANSPORT = 'mailbox'
key_relationships: EvoMapProxy composes MailboxStore, LifecycleManager, TaskMonitor, SkillUpdater, DmHandler, SessionHandler, SyncEngine, ProxyHttpServer
SyncEngine depends_on LifecycleManager (via getHeaders callback and onAuthError→reAuthenticate())
startProxy factory function wraps EvoMapProxy.start() and returns { proxy, url, port, nodeId }

constructor_signatures.EvoMapProxy: constructor({ hubUrl, dataDir, dbPath, port, logger, skillPath })
constructor_signatures.SyncEngine: constructor({ store, hubUrl, getHeaders, logger, onInboundReceived, onAuthError })

key_methods.acquireLock(): writes PID to evolver.pid with flag:wx; if EEXIST reads existing PID, kills -0 to check liveness; stale PID → overwrites; returns bool
key_methods.EvoMapProxy.start(): async; constructs all subsystems, starts HTTP server, calls hello(), startHeartbeatLoop(), sync.start()
key_methods.LifecycleManager.hello(): async; POST /a2a/hello with gep-a2a protocol envelope; stores node_secret + node_id; timeout 15s
key_methods.LifecycleManager.startHeartbeatLoop(inte: sets _running=true; immediate tick(); recursive setTimeout with exponential backoff; default interval 360s
key_methods.LifecycleManager.heartbeat(): async; POST /a2a/heartbeat; handles 401/403 via reAuthenticate(); writes inbound events to store; timeout 10s
key_methods.LifecycleManager.reAuthenticate(): async; up to 2 attempts: hello(rotateSecret:true) + heartbeat(_skipReauth:true) to confirm
key_methods.ProxyHttpServer.start(): async; clearIfStale; http.createServer; port scan 19820–19919; writeSettings on success
key_methods.SyncEngine.notifyNewOutbound(): cancels pending timer; reschedules outbound flush in 100ms

conditional_branches: main: EVOMAP_PROXY===1 || A2A_TRANSPORT===mailbox → proxy path; else → a2aProtocol heartbeat/SSE path
EvoMapProxy.start(): if !hubUrl → warn offline mode, skip hello/heartbeat/sync
LifecycleManager.heartbeat(): if 401/403 → reAuthenticate(); if data.status===unknown_node → re-hello()
ProxyHttpServer.start(): port scan loop with EADDRINUSE retry up to 100 times
SyncEngine._scheduleOutbound: next delay = 1s if pending > 0 else 5s
SyncEngine._scheduleInbound: next delay = idle interval if idle > 5min else active interval
important_notes: Lock file: evolver.pid in project root. Default proxy port: 19820 (env: EVOMAP_PROXY_PORT). Hub registration: /a2a/hello (gep-a2a protocol v1.0.0). Heartbeat interval: 360s default, min 30s. Auth via Bearer node_secret stored in MailboxStore. Sync startup delays: outbound 500ms, inbound 1000ms. SyncEngine onAuthError triggers lifecycle.reAuthenticate(). On inbound received, skillUpdater.pollAndApply() is called automatically.
